levelList.name: 岩石洗礼
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Vibration]強度不低于5級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1

levelList.name: 積聚岩石
levelList.desc: [WinDuel] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[Vibration]，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+2

levelList.name: 迸発的怠惰
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Vibration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WinDuel] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Vibration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有2層[Vibration]，使其[VibrationExplosion]1次(最多2次)。使其[Vibration]層数減少2層

levelList.name: 防御
levelList.desc:
若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>時受到攻撃，則使攻撃者増加2級[Vibration]強度 
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層守護

levelList.name: 蚕食冲撞
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Sinking]強度不低于5級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加2級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]

levelList.name: 激流
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>帯有[Sinking]，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+2

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加8級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] 随机使2名<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]

levelList.name: 漫溢的憂郁
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WinDuel] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Sinking]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加5級[Sinking]強度并対其施加4層[Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Sinking]強度，使本技能下一枚硬幣的威力+1(最多+3)

levelList.name: 閃避
levelList.desc: [OnSucceedEvade] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>失去5点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 摧誇
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多20層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10層[BloodArmor]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10級[Laceration]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)

levelList.name: 致傷
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多20層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10層[BloodArmor]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10級[Laceration]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血4式-剖除
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度不低于6級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1
[WinDuel] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[BloodArmor]每有1階段，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+20%(最多+60%)
[DefeatDuel] 消耗4層[BloodArmor]

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血11式-貫穿
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有3級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WinDuel] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[BloodArmor]每有1階段，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+20% (最多+60%)
[DefeatDuel] 消耗4層[BloodArmor]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 触発<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration](<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]層数)次并消耗<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]層数至1層

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派桑丘変体4式-追踪
levelList.desc:
優先指定[Laceration]最多的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[BeforeAttack] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10層[BloodArmor]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] 消耗最多30層[BloodDinner]，每消耗15層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多2)
- 若未消耗[BloodDinner]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度，立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]，并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層
[EndSkill] 獲得層数相当于本技能<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的[BloodDinner]

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層[Binding]
- 若本技能消耗了30層[BloodDinner]，則額外施加2層[Binding]

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派桑丘変体3式-突襲
levelList.desc:
優先指定[Laceration]最多的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[BeforeAttack] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有10級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] 消耗最多30層[BloodDinner]，每消耗15層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]并使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多2)
- 若未消耗[BloodDinner]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度，立即触発<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]，并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少1層
[EndSkill] 獲得層数相当于本技能<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的[BloodDinner]

coindescs.desc:
[OnSucceedAttack] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層[Paralysis]
- 若本技能消耗了50層[BloodDinner]，則額外施加2層[Paralysis]

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血2式-硬血
levelList.desc:
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
[StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[SwirlingBlood]
[StartBattle] 消耗100層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[BloodArmor]，20点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>
- 若[BloodDinner]層数不足，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加50級[Laceration]強度，并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Laceration]層数減少2層。随后使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得200点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>(該<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于1)
[DefeatDuel] 帯有通過本技能獲得的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>時，対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加3層[Vulnerable]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加5級[Laceration]強度并対其施加3層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 冒険結束了
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有1級[Laceration]強度，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+10%(最多+200%)
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有3層[BloodArmor]，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+10%(最多+100%)
[StartBattle] 消耗(45-<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>)層[BloodDinner]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復至45点
- 若[BloodDinner]層数不足，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復至45点
- 獲得相当于剩余[BloodDinner]層数的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>(最多100点)
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度
[EndSkill] 獲得相当于対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的[BloodDinner]層数
[EndSkill] 若<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則獲得相当于<color=#ffffff>目標</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限的[BloodDinner]層数

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度并対其施加3層[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 使除<color=#ffffff>目標</color>以外的<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>敵方単位</color>増加5級[Laceration]強度并対其施加3層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 冒険結束了…
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>總計每帯有10級[Laceration]強度，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+40%(最多+200%)
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每消耗1層[BloodDinner]，使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+10%(最多+100%)
[StartBattle] 消耗(45-<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>)層[BloodDinner]并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復至45点
- 若[BloodDinner]層数不足，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加20級[Laceration]強度并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color><color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復至45点
- 獲得相当于剩余[BloodDinner]層数的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>(最多100点)
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度
[EndSkill] 獲得相当于対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的[BloodDinner]層数
[EndSkill] 若<color=#7C5738>撃殺</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則獲得相当于<color=#ffffff>目標</color><color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限的[BloodDinner]層数

coindescs.desc: 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加10級[Laceration]強度并対其施加3層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 圧縮
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有5級[Breath]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+3)

coindescs.desc: [CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Vibration]強度并対其施加2層[Vibration]

levelList.name: 分解
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有3級[Breath]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)

coindescs.desc: [CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]。使其[VibrationExplosion]時，使其[Vibration]層数減少1層

levelList.name: 執行分析
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Breath]強度不低于10級，則消耗[Breath]強度，每消耗3級[Breath]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+2(最多+4)。該效果每使本技能増加1点<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>，額外消耗3級[Breath]強度

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Vibration]層数不低于5層，則使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]。使其[VibrationExplosion]時，使其[Vibration]層数減少1層
[WinDuelAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加5級[Vibration]強度并対其施加3層[Vibration]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]2次。使其[VibrationExplosion]時，使其[Vibration]層数減少1層(若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>拼点勝利，則使減少的效果无效1次)

levelList.name: 啓動銷毀程序
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗<color=#ffffff>自身</color>一半的[Breath]強度与[Breath]層数
- 使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+(消耗的[Breath]強度与[Breath]層数之和/2)(最多+20)
- 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+(消耗的[Breath]強度×2)%(最多+50%)
- 使本技能<color=#ffffff>暴撃</color>時造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+(消耗的[Breath]層数×4)%(最多+100%)
[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>剩余的[Breath]層数減半

coindescs.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>上回合未受到<color=#61DA61>体力</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>，則使本硬幣必定<color=#ffffff>暴撃</color>
若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>上回合受到了<color=#61DA61>体力</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>，則使本硬幣必定不会<color=#ffffff>暴撃</color>，并使造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]3次。使其[VibrationExplosion]時，每触発1次[VibrationExplosion]，使其[Vibration]層数減少3層(最多減少9層)

levelList.name: 考察
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有3級[Breath]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加4級[Breath]強度
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>，則額外使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[Breath]

coindescs.desc: [CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Vibration]強度并対其施加2層[Vibration]

[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]3次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少3層

levelList.name: 考察

[CanDuelGuard]
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有3級[Breath]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加4級[Breath]強度
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>，則額外使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[Breath]
